title: Bog Divinian
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Bog Divinian |homeworld=[[Nuralee]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] (dyed) |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] **[[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I don't have time for difficult parents."
"Now, who are you calling difficult? I'm easy.|Bog Divinian annoys Jenna Zan Arbor|''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]''}} '''Bog Divinian''', nicknamed '''[[Bantha/Legends|Bantha]] Bog''' by [[Keets Freely]], was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] from [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]] until [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]; he represented [[Nuralee]]. Later, he fell in with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Afterwards, he became the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Leemurtoo system]]. ==Biography== By the time of his [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]], Divinian was a homesteader in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' The husband of [[Astri Oddo]] and father of [[Lune Oddo Divinian]], he was elected to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] with backing from the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' In exchange, he kept quiet about their involvement in a scandal on the planet [[Euceron]]: Divinian had served there on the [[Games Council]] for the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of 26 BBY, in which he initially served simply as an unwitting pawn, but later as a knowing accomplice—by his unwillingness to testify (spurning a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] team's request) against guilty high-profile Council members—in a conspiracy with the Commerce Guild to discredit certain respected Senators in exchange for untold wealth and power.''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' ===Games Council groveler=== While it was noted that Bog disapproved of [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]], this may have just been consistent with his early behavior as an innocent "Yes"-man bowing to power, merely affirming the ultra-hypocritical attitude of the Games Council leadership as to the distasteful "illegalities" of the sport, in which the Council had intimately, albeit clandestinely, involved itself. Even so, in the end, Divinian's failure of integrity to disclose the truth about the Games scandal, transformed the power-hungry bureaucrat into a complicit criminal alongside his fellow Council-member perpetrators. ===Anti-Jedi Senator=== Divinian, caught now in the web of prejudice and political corruption, later joined [[Sano Sauro]]'s [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi]] faction in denouncing the Jedi, debating heatedly with [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] over Senate support of the Jedi in the [[Senate Hearing Chamber]]. However, his proposals lost all support when the Jedi stopped [[Granta Omega]]'s vicious [[Attack on the Senate Building|attempt]] to murder [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and ''thousands'' of Senators with their top advisors in the [[Grand Convocation Chamber|Senate Rotunda]] itself. At some point in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Divinian had sided with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].Guide to Characters section in ''[[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi]]'' series from [[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon|''Secret Weapon'']] to [[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning|''Reckoning'']], under "Astri Oddo" What his position of power was during that time is unknown. ===Imperial Advisor & Governor=== By [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], Divinian had managed to rise to the rank of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Advisor/Legends|Advisor]]. Stationed on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]], he was in charge of overseeing [[Ferus Olin]]'s attempt to root out the [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] in the planet-wide computer system.''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' When Samaria fell to Imperial occupation, Divinian was appointed [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Leemurtoo system]], encompassing both Samaria and [[Rosha]].''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' Later that year, Divinian wholeheartedly enrolled Lune in the [[Imperial Naval Academy (Coruscant)|Coruscant Naval Academy]].''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' When the instructor, [[Maggis]], called him in for a conference later that year, Maggis told Divinian that eight-year-old Lune had been selected for an unknown project. Although Divinian showed some discomfort, he allowed his son to be taken away. Unknown to him, Lune would be the subject of scientist [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]'s experimental memory drug. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' {{Ab|Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} {{Imo}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' {{C|Mentioned in "Guide to Characters"}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Bog Divinian }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Divinian, Bog}} [[Category:Bureaucrats of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Commerce Guild members]] [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems individuals]] [[Category:Galactic Republic senators]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
